Video.summary: The high-octane energy of the Arena Championship Series East hits the Steel City as Monster Jam takes over PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. This episode features elite drivers pushing their 12,000-pound machines to the limit in JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and a spectacular Freestyle finale. Watch as the intensity peaks with a high-stakes family showdown between Jon Zimmer and his son, Jon Zimmer Jr., and follow the inspiring journey of MJ Solorio as he transforms from a "super fan to superstar" behind the wheel of El Toro Loco. From the legendary rivalry of Grave Digger to Coty Saucier's masterful performance in Dragon, witness a night of shattered limits and epic dirt-shredding action.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: In this week’s action-packed compilation, we’re bringing you the most insane Freestyles from our latest Freestyle Mania events. The ones that earned the top scores from YOU, the fans! Featuring iconic Monster Jam trucks like JCB Digatron, Sparkle Smash, and more!
Video.title: Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation

Image.alt: Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation
Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation
Top 15 Scored Freestyles Of Freestyle Mania Events Compilation

Video.summary: What goes up must come down- and that means carnage! Ten monster trucks attempt to make history or be history during the freestyle action at the Metrodome.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West takes over the tacky track at State Farm as Ryan Anderson looks to continue his winning ways after clinching the series championship as he returns to Grave Digger.
Video.title: State Farm Stadium - Glendale, AZ

Video.summary: Let's get wild with the Monster Jam trucks as they race through the muddy Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam held this high-octane championship event at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas on July 6th, 2019.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes wild at the Alamodome in San Antonio on January 12, 2008.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Freestyle

Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: The Metrodome is hot with anticipation of Monster Jam freestyle during the 2000 season of Monster Jam.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: ATV racing, Friday night freestyle and more as Monster Jam visits Rosemont, IL.

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 11 of the Stadium Championship Series, at US Bank Stadium in Minneapolis, MN.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: The home of Arizona's Diamondbacks is made completely over for the exciting freestyle action from Monster Jam in Phoenix, AZ, on January 27, 2007.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Freestyle

Video.summary: Get ready to jam with Monster Jam's racing action from Cowboys Stadium, on February 25, 2012.

Video.summary: Don't miss this epic compilation of the best freestyle run moments from 2019.
Video.title: Best of Freestyle Runs - 2019

Video.summary: Racing, skills, and freestyle action are in store during Monster Jam's stop in Anaheim, CA.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Inglewood, CA is the next stop for Monster Jam Primetime with all the racing, skills, and freestyle action!
Video.title: Sofi Stadium - Inglewood, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues at Golden 1 Credit Union Center in Sacramento, CA featuring racing, 2-wheel, donuts, and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA

Image.alt: Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA
Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA
Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: Feel the ground shake as the 2026 Monster Jam season kicks off with a high-octane battle in Salt Lake City. Watch legendary icons like Grave Digger and Megalodon go head-to-head against reigning World Finals champion Blake Granger in Monster Mutt Dalmatian and Armando Castro, who is celebrating 25 years of El Toro Loco. From the precision of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge to the adrenaline-fueled chaos of a Freestyle finale packed with backflips and drifting, these elite athletes push 12,000-pound machines to their absolute limits.
Video.title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
